scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint:check -w backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run relay:validate && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
